questionHtml: The measurements of T were collected five times. Explain how repeated measurements of T reduced the random error in the final experimental value of mr.
markschemeHtml:
mention of mean/average value «of T» ✓

this reduces uncertainty in T / result
OR
more accurate/precise ✓

 

Reference to “random errors average out” scores MP1

Accept “closer to true value”, “more reliable value” OWTTE for MP2

meta.title: The measurements of T were collected five times. Explain how repeated measurements of T reduced the random error in the final experimental value of mr.
